subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit and are deserving of the Desired One, Who hath illumined the world with the effulgent lights of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزا که بانوار اسم اعظم عالم را منور فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @station of the Manifestation of God, @petitions to authorities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
